name: image-blocker
description: Browser extension that filters images per-site using ONNX/TF.js classification models

scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/build-scripts.mjs && web-ext build -o
scripts.build:dev: vite build && node scripts/build-scripts.mjs --dev && web-ext build -o
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:dev && node test/generate-fixtures.mjs && npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:update: npm run build:dev && node test/generate-fixtures.mjs && npx playwright test --update-snapshots
